title: Emberlene
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Image}} {{CelestialBody |image= |name=Emberlene |region=[[Expansion Region/Legends|Expansion Region]]{{SW|url=news/star-wars-the-essential-atlas-online-companion|text=''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}} |sector=[[Authala sector/Legends|Authala sector]] |system=[[Emberlene system/Legends|Emberlene system]] |coordinates=P-12 |xyz= |distance= |suns= |orbited= |position= |moons= |routes= |lengthday= |lengthyear= |class= |diameter= |atmosphere= |climate= |gravity= |terrain= |water= |interest= |flora= |fauna= |otherlife= |species= |otherspecies=[[Human/Legends|Humans]] |socialgroup= |language=[[Mistryl battle language]] |government=[[Eleven Elders of the People]]''[[Galaxy at War]]'' |population= |demonym= |cities= |imports= |exports= |affiliation=*[[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]]''[[Hero's Guide]]'' *[[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]''[[The Last Command Sourcebook]]''{{GamerCite|3|The Smugglers Alliance}} }} {{Quote|Speaking of Emberlene, I'd stay away from there if I were you. For that matter, I'd stay away from any other Mistryl, period.|[[Karoly D'ulin]], to [[Shada D'ukal]]|''[[Specter of the Past]]''}} '''Emberlene''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located in the [[Authala sector/Legends|Authala sector]] of the [[Expansion Region/Legends|Expansion Region]]. ==History== {{Quote|They say that three years before its destruction, the rulers of Emberlene set off on a rampage of conquest. That for the first two and a half of those years they destroyed and conquered and plundered every one of the dozen other worlds within their reach.''"
"''No. No. That can't be true. We wouldn't… we couldn't have done something like that.''"
"''The average citizens weren't told the true story, of course. Though I imagine most could have read between the lines if they'd truly wanted to know what their leaders were doing. But they had triumph and spoils, pride and glory. Why bother with mere truth?|[[Jorj Car'das]] and [[Shada D'ukal]]|''[[Vision of the Future]]''}} Emberlene was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] inhabited by the matriarchal [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Mistryl Shadow Guard|Mistryl]] and governed by a council known as the [[Eleven Elders of the People]]. It was famous as the home world of the [[Mistryl Shadow Guard]]s, highly-trained warrior-women who could be hired for a variety of roles, including bodyguards, assassins, commandos or anti-piracy pickets for high-security cargoes. During the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], the planet joined the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]] and conquered many neighboring worlds. In response, various conquered peoples pooled their resources and hired a mercenary army under the command of rogue factions of the [[Sun Guard|Thyrsian Sun Guard]] to [[Destruction of Emberlene|raze]] Emberlene, leaving on it an impoverished people supported only by the income of the Shadow Guard. Although the Eleven Elders privately conceded that their own imperialism had been the cause for their neighbors' attack, they spread the myth that Emberlene had been an innocent victim of Imperial aggression, and the Mistryl proudly refused to have any dealings with the [[New Order/Legends|New Order]], although in practice, even this principle was negotiable. After the Clone Wars, Emberlene appeared to have remained independent. The planet was, at least on an official level, defiantly hostile to the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], and there was no evidence that it ever joined the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] or the [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances]]. ==Appearances== *{{StoryCite|story=Hammertong: The Tale of the "Tonnika Sisters"|book=Tales from the Mos Eisley Cantina}} {{Ab|Hammertong (audiobook)}} {{Imo}} *{{GalaxiesNGE}} {{Mo}} *''[[Specter of the Past]]'' {{Ab|Specter of the Past (unabridged audiobook)}} {{Mo}} {{1stID|Emberlene|in book}} *[[Specter of the Past (abridged audiobook)|''Specter of the Past'' abridged audiobook]] {{Mo}} *''[[Vision of the Future]]'' {{Ab|Vision of the Future (unabridged audiobook)}} {{Mo}} *[[Vision of the Future (abridged audiobook)|''Vision of the Future'' abridged audiobook]] {{Mo}} *''[[The New Jedi Order: Agents of Chaos II: Jedi Eclipse]]'' {{Mo}} *[[The New Jedi Order: Agents of Chaos II: Jedi Eclipse (abridged audiobook)|''The New Jedi Order: Agents of Chaos II: Jedi Eclipse'' abridged audiobook]] {{Mo}} ==Sources== {{Mediacat|imagecat=Images of Emberlene}} *''[[The Last Command Sourcebook]]'' {{1stm}} {{Imo}} *''[[The Thrawn Trilogy Sourcebook]]'' {{Imo}} *{{GamerCite|3|The Smugglers Alliance}} {{Imo}} *''[[Hero's Guide]]'' *{{SonyCite|url=players/content.vm?id=66937&resource=features|text=The Azure Cabal}} *''[[Threats of the Galaxy]]'' {{Imo}} *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' *''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' *{{SW|url=news/star-wars-the-essential-atlas-online-companion|text=''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}} *''[[Galaxy at War]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} [[Category:Authala sector locations]] [[Category:Confederacy of Independent Systems planets]] [[Category:Devastated planets]] [[Category:Galactic Empire planets]] [[Category:Planets in the Expansion Region]] [[Category:Planets in the Slice]] [[Category:Terrestrial planets]]
